ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Jump Shot, Driving Dunk Shot) */,
  "combined_shot_type" TEXT /* Combined shot type (e.g., Jump Shot) */,
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the shot location */,
  "loc_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the shot location on the court */,
  "loc_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the shot location on the court */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the shot location */,
  "minutes_remaining" INTEGER /* Minutes remaining in the period when the shot was taken */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game is a playoff game (1 for playoff, 0 for regular season) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "seconds_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the period when the shot was taken */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "shot_made_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the shot was made (1 for made, 0 for missed) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., 2PT Field Goal, 3PT Field Goal) */,
  "shot_zone_area" TEXT /* Area on the court where the shot was taken (e.g., Right Side(R), Left Side(L)) */,
  "shot_zone_basic" TEXT /* Basic shot zone (e.g., Mid-Range, Paint) */,
  "shot_zone_range" TEXT /* Range of the shot (e.g., 16-24 ft., 8-16 ft.) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "matchup" TEXT /* Matchup description (e.g., LAL @ POR) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player who took the shot */,
  "shot_clock" REAL /* Time remaining on the shot clock when the shot was taken */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles taken before the shot */,
  "offensive_rebound" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the shot was taken after an offensive rebound */,
  "defensive_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the defensive player closest to the shooter */,
  "block_attempt" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether a block was attempted on the shot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's jersey */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or file path of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "matchup" TEXT /* Matchup description (e.g., LAL @ POR) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the away team */,
  "playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game is a playoff game (1 for playoff, 0 for regular season) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans who attended the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "player_height_inches" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number of the player in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot zone */,
  "zone_area" TEXT /* Area on the court where the shot was taken (e.g., Right Side(R), Left Side(L)) */,
  "zone_basic" TEXT /* Basic shot zone (e.g., Mid-Range, Paint) */,
  "zone_range" TEXT /* Range of the shot (e.g., 16-24 ft., 8-16 ft.) */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each shot zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team the user is associated with */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the game (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id")
)
